title: Digital Microfluidics for Gene/Disease Diagnostics
titleZh: 數位微流體基因／疾病診斷平台
taglineZh: 用於分子檢測的可程式化液滴
why: Digital microfluidics turns droplets into programmable laboratory units. Electrical signals move, mix, split, and meter nanolitre-scale droplets for molecular sample preparation and gene/disease diagnostic workflows.
whyZh: 數位微流體把液滴變成可程式化的實驗單元；電訊號可移動、混合、分裂與定量奈升尺度液滴，支援分子樣品前處理與基因／疾病診斷流程。
challenge: Uniform droplets, low sample loss, reliable actuation, and integration of biological preparation steps must work together.
challengeZh: 均一液滴、低樣品損耗、可靠驅動與生物前處理步驟的整合，必須同時成立。
innovation: Frequency-controlled parallel-plate EWOD provides a simple control handle for either uniform or intentionally unequal droplet volumes.
innovationZh: 頻率控制的平行板 EWOD 提供簡潔的操控參數，可產生均一或刻意不等體積的液滴。
evidence: 1 kHz: a larger number of nanolitre-scale, volume-uniform droplets
Programmable transport, mixing, splitting, and dispensing
Parallel reagent metering and serial-dilution routes
evidenceZh: 500 Hz：產生兩種液滴體積族群
1 kHz：可生成較多數目、nL 等級的體積均一液滴
可程式化輸送、混合、分裂與分注
可延伸至平行試劑定量與序列稀釋
future: Develop robust parallel workflows for molecular diagnostics.
futureZh: 發展用於分子診斷的穩定平行化流程。
connects: Provides the sample-handling foundation for biosensing and precision health.
connectsZh: 為生醫感測與精準健康提供樣品操作基礎。

media.title: Digital microfluidics research
media.description: A direct look at programmable droplet manipulation and its research possibilities.
media.descriptionZh: 直接認識可程式化液滴操控與其研究可能性。

media.title: TENG-powered digital microfluidics
media.titleZh: TENG 自供電數位微流體
media.description: Self-powered droplet actuation connecting triboelectric energy harvesting with digital microfluidic control.
media.descriptionZh: 將摩擦奈米發電與數位微流體控制結合的自供電液滴驅動。

media.title: Digital microfluidic optical switch
media.description: A fluidic optical-switch concept showing how droplets and interfaces can control optical paths.
media.descriptionZh: 以液滴與介面控制光路的微流體光學開關概念。

title: Wearable, Flexible & Self-Powered Biosensing
titleZh: 穿戴式、柔性與自供電生醫感測
tagline: Human-centred sensing for continuous physiological insight
taglineZh: 以人為本的連續生理感測
why: Wearable devices must be comfortable, sensitive, low-cost, and dependable enough to capture meaningful signals in daily life.
whyZh: 穿戴式裝置必須兼具舒適、高靈敏、低成本與可靠性，才能在日常生活中捕捉有意義的生理訊號。
challenge: Sensitivity, range, repeatability, power use, and clinical relevance often pull in different directions.
challengeZh: 靈敏度、量測範圍、重複性、耗電與臨床價值常彼此拉扯。
innovation: Origami structures, nanomaterials, low-power electronics, and self-powered strategies create practical sensing platforms.
innovationZh: 摺紙結構、奈米材料、低功耗電子與自供電策略，共同形成實用感測平台。
evidenceZh: 靈敏度最高約 3.75 kPa⁻¹
量測範圍最高約 20 kPa
10,000 次循環測試
脈搏與姿態展示
futureZh: 多模態電子皮膚與可進入現場的監測。
connects: Generates continuous signals for AI interpretation.
connectsZh: 產生可供 AI 判讀的連續訊號。

media.title: Wearable devices and AI
media.titleZh: 穿戴裝置與 AI 的結合
media.description: A research video connecting wearable sensing with AI-assisted interpretation.
media.descriptionZh: 連結穿戴式感測與 AI 輔助判讀的研究影片。

title: AI-Enabled Precision Health
tagline: Integrating sensing, patient context, and decisions
taglineZh: 整合感測、個人化資訊與決策
why: Useful precision health needs continuous data in context.
whyZh: 有價值的精準健康需要脈絡化的連續資料。
challenge: Patient variation and machine artifacts complicate trustworthy real-time prediction.
challengeZh: 個體差異與設備干擾，使可信的即時預測更具挑戰。
innovation: Multi-wavelength optical sensing combines with patient-specific variables and machine learning.
innovationZh: 多波長光學感測結合個人化變項與機器學習。
evidence: Thirty sessions from nine ESRD patients
evidenceZh: 九位 ESRD 病人、三十次療程
每分鐘監測
六項臨床重要指標
多項預測 R² 約達 0.95
futureZh: 多中心驗證與可解釋 AI。
connects: Converts sensing data into personalised health decisions.
connectsZh: 將感測資料轉化為個人化健康決策。

media.title: Wearable devices and AI
media.titleZh: 穿戴裝置與 AI 的結合
media.description: A related video showing how physiological sensing and AI can connect in digital health systems.
media.descriptionZh: 展示生理感測與 AI 如何連結於數位健康系統的相關影片。

title: Adaptive Bioinspired Systems
why: Healthcare and agricultural systems need safe, precise interaction with living environments.
whyZh: 健康與農業系統需要安全、精準地與生命環境互動。
challenge: Controlled soft motion, sensing integration, and robust operation must be achieved without sacrificing simplicity.
challengeZh: 可控軟性運動、感測整合與穩定操作，必須在不犧牲簡潔性的前提下達成。
innovation: Programmed magnetic materials enable biomimetic actuation.
innovationZh: 可程式化磁性材料實現仿生驅動。
evidence: Four-finger robot in air and water
evidenceZh: 花瓣旋轉約 70°
四指機器人可於空氣與水中操作
微型仿生手操控
futureZh: 整合感測與閉迴路控制。
connects: Extends sensing and AI into physical action.
connectsZh: 將感測與 AI 延伸至實體行動。

title: Acoustofluidic Filtration
taglineZh: 以氣泡聲流實現快速分離
why: Microscale filtration can foul quickly. Bubble-based acoustofluidics restores flow while separating cells and particles.
whyZh: 微尺度過濾容易阻塞；氣泡聲流可在分離細胞與顆粒時恢復流動。
challenge: Maintain throughput, recovery, and sample integrity in complex mixtures.
challengeZh: 在複雜樣品中同時維持通量、回收率與樣品完整性。
innovation: Cross-flow filtration and oscillating bubbles clear the filter surface.
innovationZh: 錯流過濾結合振盪氣泡，清除濾膜表面。
evidenceZh: 約 0.5 秒移除污染層
後續 STR 分析成功
future: Higher throughput and integrated molecular analysis.
futureZh: 提升通量並整合分子分析。
connects: Adds robust sample preparation to diagnostic systems.
connectsZh: 為診斷系統補上可靠的樣品前處理。

title: Electro-Controlled Microfluidics for Exosome Engineering
titleZh: 電控微流體外泌體工程與分析
tagline: Preparing, engineering, and analysing extracellular vesicles
taglineZh: 外泌體製備、工程化與分析
why: Exosome preparation can be slow, sample-intensive, and difficult to standardise. Controlled microfluidic workflows help make each step visible and repeatable.
whyZh: 外泌體製備常耗時、耗樣品且不易標準化；受控微流體流程有助於讓每一步更可見、可重複。
challenge: Capture efficiency, wash steps, sample compatibility, and downstream analysis must be balanced within small volumes.
challengeZh: 捕捉效率、清洗步驟、樣品相容性與後續分析，必須在小體積中取得平衡。
innovation: Electro-controlled microfluidics supports exosome isolation, loading or functionalisation, hydrogel encapsulation, and online analysis.
innovationZh: 電控微流體支援外泌體分離、載入或功能化、水凝膠包覆與線上分析。
evidence: Workflow development for isolation and engineering
evidenceZh: 建立分離與工程化流程
水凝膠包覆概念
可程式化清洗與裂解步驟
可延伸至分子讀出前處理
future: Validate repeatable preparation workflows and integrate molecular assays.
futureZh: 驗證可重複的製備流程並整合分子檢測。
connects: A distinct extracellular-vesicle workflow alongside digital microfluidic diagnostics.
connectsZh: 與數位微流體診斷並列、但獨立的胞外囊泡研究流程。

media.title: Exosome microfluidics research
media.description: A video link for exosome-related microfluidic preparation and engineering concepts.
media.descriptionZh: 外泌體微流體製備與工程化概念的研究影片。
